# CommonMark Official Examples Notice

`official-stable-inputs.cases` is derived from the generated CommonMark suite
snapshot identified as `upstream-tests/commonmark.rs`.

The generated suite originates in the CommonMark specification examples. The
CommonMark specification is authored by John MacFarlane and licensed under the
Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International license
(`CC-BY-SA-4.0`):

- https://spec.commonmark.org/
- https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/

Expected HTML renderings from the upstream generated suite are checked by the
separate AST-to-HTML conformance corpus where they are part of that bench's
runnable surface.
